summary: Phase 3 Performance Governance + Phase 2 Layout Fix testing complete. All backend APIs working (13/13 tests passed). Frontend governance page and vendor performance page fully functional with correct layouts.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Vendor: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: None - used existing governance settings and performance data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Governance Phase 3 complete. Governance settings stored in performance_governance collection with key='settings'. Audit log in performance_governance_audit collection. Sales and vendor performance services now read weights/thresholds from governance collection. Admin page at /admin/performance-governance with sidebar link under Settings section.

1_governance_get_settings.details: Returns settings with sales and vendor sections containing weights, thresholds, min_sample_size. Falls back to defaults if no config exists.

2_governance_put_settings.details: Saves settings, normalizes weights to sum=1.0, enforces threshold ordering (excellent > safe > risk).

3_governance_audit_log.details: Returns change history entries with changed_by, action, created_at fields.

4_governance_access_control.details: Non-admin users (sales, customer) get 403. Unauthenticated requests get 401/403.

5_sales_performance_integration.details: Returns team list with performance_score and performance_zone. Detail endpoint returns breakdown with 5 metrics.

6_vendor_performance_integration.details: Team endpoint returns vendor list. My-performance returns breakdown with 5 metrics (Timeliness, Quality, Responsiveness, Internal Rating, Process Compliance).

7_admin_governance_page_ui.details: Page loads with two role sections (Sales, Vendor) side by side. Each has weight sliders (5 per role), zone threshold inputs (3 per role), min sample size input. Save/Reset buttons work. Last saved timestamp and admin name shown. Audit log section at bottom.

8_admin_sidebar_link.details: Performance Settings link visible under Settings section with moduleKey='settings'.

9_vendor_performance_page_layout.details: Uses standard partner shell layout. KPI stat cards row (Performance, Zone, Data Points, Last Updated). Full-width cards (1576px, not centered/constrained). Score breakdown with 5 metrics. How to Improve tips section.

10_save_reset_functionality.details: Save button persists changes with success toast. Reset button reverts to last saved values. Weights auto-normalize to 100%.

governance_data_note: Current settings: Sales weights (customer_rating 36%, conversion_rate 23%, revenue_contribution 18%, response_speed 14%, follow_up_compliance 9%), thresholds (excellent 85, safe 70, risk 50), min_sample 5. Vendor weights (timeliness 25%, quality 25%, responsiveness 20%, rating 20%, compliance 10%), same thresholds, min_sample 3.
